option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
""" FastAPI application for returning HomeResponse data structure """
from fastapi import FastAPI from pydantic import BaseModel, Field from typing import List, Optional from datetime import datetime from enum import Enum
app = FastAPI(title="My Happy Workplace API", version="1.0.0")
# Enums class CategoryStatusEnum(str, Enum): HAPPY = "happy" NEUTRAL = "neutral" SAD = "sad"
# Models class Goal(BaseModel): id: str = Field(..., alias="_id") title: str description: Optional[str] = "" category_id: str = Field(..., alias="category_id")
class Config: populate_by_name = True
class Category(BaseModel): id: str = Field(..., alias="_id") title: str icon_url: str = Field(..., alias="iconUrl") description: Optional[str] = "" is_active: bool = Field(..., alias="is_active") goals: List[Goal] = [] color: str # Hex color code
class Config: populate_by_name = True
class CategoryEmotion(BaseModel): category: Category user_id: Optional[str] = Field(None, alias="user_id") emotion: CategoryStatusEnum
class Config: populate_by_name = True
class GoalAction(BaseModel): id: Optional[str] = Field(None, alias="_id") goal_id: str = Field(..., alias="goal_id") category: Category action: str frequency: str start_date: datetime = Field(..., alias="start_date") estimated_end_date: datetime = Field(..., alias="estimated_end_date") start_time: str = Field(..., alias="start_time") end_time: str = Field(..., alias="end_time") status: str is_completed_by_user: bool = Field(False, alias="is_completed_by_user")
class Config: populate_by_name = True
class ActionProgress(BaseModel): id: str = Field(..., alias="_id") date: str start_time: str = Field(..., alias="start_time") end_time: str = Field(..., alias="end_time") status: str version: int = Field(..., alias="__v") created_at: datetime = Field(..., alias="createdAt") updated_at: datetime = Field(..., alias="updatedAt") action: GoalAction
class Config: populate_by_name = True
class HomeResponseDataModel(BaseModel): has_historical_emotions: bool = Field(..., alias="has_historical_emotions") category_emotions: List[CategoryEmotion] = Field(..., alias="categoryEmotions") upcoming_actions: List[ActionProgress] = Field(..., alias="upcoming_actions") alerts: List[GoalAction]
class Config: populate_by_name = True
class HomeResponse(BaseModel): data: HomeResponseDataModel message: str = "Home data retrieved successfully" status: str = "success"
# Sample data generators def get_sample_category() -> Category: return Category( _id="cat_001", title="Health", iconUrl="health.svg", description="Health related goals", is_active=True, goals=[], color="#FF6B6B" )
def get_sample_category_emotion() -> CategoryEmotion: return CategoryEmotion( category=get_sample_category(), user_id="user_123", emotion=CategoryStatusEnum.HAPPY )
def get_sample_goal_action() -> GoalAction: return GoalAction( _id="action_001", goal_id="goal_001", category=get_sample_category(), action="Do 30 minutes of exercise", frequency="daily", start_date=datetime.now(), estimated_end_date=datetime.now(), start_time="06:00", end_time="06:30", status="pending", is_completed_by_user=False )
def get_sample_action_progress() -> ActionProgress: return ActionProgress( _id="progress_001", date="2026-04-15", start_time="06:00", end_time="06:30", status="pending", __v=1, createdAt=datetime.now(), updatedAt=datetime.now(), action=get_sample_goal_action() )
# Endpoints @app.get("/api/home", response_model=HomeResponse) async def get_home_response(): """ Returns the home response with user's dashboard data including: - Historical emotions by category - Upcoming actions - Alerts """ response_data = HomeResponseDataModel( has_historical_emotions=True, categoryEmotions=[ get_sample_category_emotion(), CategoryEmotion( category=Category( _id="cat_002", title="Work", iconUrl="work.svg", description="Work related goals", is_active=True, goals=[], color="#4ECDC4" ), user_id="user_123", emotion=CategoryStatusEnum.NEUTRAL ), ], upcoming_actions=[ get_sample_action_progress(), ], alerts=[ get_sample_goal_action(), ] )
return HomeResponse( data=response_data, message="Home data retrieved successfully", status="success" )
@app.post("/api/home", response_model=HomeResponse) async def create_home_response(request: HomeResponse): """ Creates or updates home response data """ return request
@app.get("/health", tags=["Health Check"]) async def health_check(): """Health check endpoint""" return {"status": "healthy", "service": "My Happy Workplace API"}
if __name__ == "__main__": import uvicorn uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)
